_comment: Preview sweep for Task 2D.11 (vorticity-augmented FH ansatz, axisymmetric A_phi). Pins the 6 FH params at the Session 11 strict-pass anchor (V=0.5, sigma=10, m0=3, a=0.05, ell=4, r=9) and scans 4 vortical params (V_A, sigma_A, r_A, ell_A) on a small 3x3x3x3 = 81-point grid. V_A=0 reproduces the irrotational baseline bit-exactly (regression checked). Designed to run in <30 s locally with the dispatcher's worker cap. Decision gate after preview: does any vortical augmentation produce passenger_zone_radius > h?
